findingsNew.claim: workflow-invariance.vitest.ts scans public AI-facing surfaces but path-allowlists whole default public roots before asserting no banned vocabulary remains.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked whether the allowance was scoped to maintainer-only files or fixtures; separate narrow allowances exist, but isLegacyPhaseCleanupDebt broadly covers .opencode/agents/, .opencode/commands/, root policy docs, and SKILL.md. Sampled current surfaces with rg; current hits were not required to prove the false-negative path.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The allowance may be temporary cleanup debt, but the final implementation summary and resource map mark these surfaces as cleaned and directly scanned by the invariance test.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if these paths are intentionally reclassified as out-of-scope or another required gate scans them without the broad allowlist.

spec_code.notes: REQ-002/SC-003 require public-surface workflow invariance; the test suppresses whole default public roots.

checklist_evidence.notes: No applied/T-*.md directory exists; used spec/resource-map/implementation-summary/test evidence.

resource_map_coverage.notes: Sampled resolver, renderer, scaffolder, validator, and workflow-invariance surfaces; new gap is workflow-invariance gate correctness.

overlay.notes: Agent/command public surfaces are collected but path-allowlisted before assertion.

findingDetails.title: Workflow-invariance test path-allowlists the public surfaces it claims to gate
findingDetails.evidence: collectDefaultSurfaces includes .opencode/command, .opencode/agent, and SKILL.md, but isLegacyPhaseCleanupDebt marks those same public roots allowed and isAllowedHit drops every non-extra hit before the final empty-hit assertion.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the broad public-root allowlist or replace it with narrow documented exceptions, then add a default-public-surface sentinel proving banned vocabulary fails inside .opencode/agent or .opencode/commands/spec_kit.
findingDetails.scopeProof: The allowlist is centralized and applies to all file hits under the listed public roots; extra-path sentinel coverage does not exercise default public paths suppressed by isLegacyPhaseCleanupDebt.

title: Workflow-invariance test path-allowlists the public surfaces it claims to gate

detail: REQ-002 and SC-003 require public-surface workflow invariance; workflow-invariance.vitest.ts suppresses whole default public roots before assertion.
Resource map lists agent prompts, command surfaces, and SKILL.md as AI-facing cleanup targets; workflow-invariance collects but allowlists those paths.
P1 because the CI gate can false-pass on required public-surface cleanup regressions; this is a release-gate correctness issue, not a runtime crash or security exploit.

reason: Sampled level-contract resolver, template-utils, inline renderer, create.sh, and shell validator integration; no additional code-correctness finding was confirmed this iteration.
